title: NANA Apologizes for In Memoriam Error in November Issue of the Hunter
summary: In the November issue of The Hunter, the shareholder names listed in the In Memoriam were printed incorrectly. We have corrected the electronic newsletter on nana.com, and we will print the corrected names in our next newsletter. We send our sincerest and deepest apologies for this oversight to the...

title: IARC science at AGU 2021
summary: Over thirty IARC researchers and students are participating in the 2021 American Geophysical Union fall meeting held both virtually and in New Orleans. We hope to connect with our colleagues and friends during the following presentations and events. For those in New Orleans, please also stop by the University of Alaska Fairbanks booth (number 933) which is co-hosted by IARC science communications team. In addition to giving and convening talks and posters, IARC researchers are participating in a press conference for NOAA’s Arctic Report Card and hosting a town hall for the Study of Arctic Environmental Change. For updates during the meeting, follow IARC on Twitter , Facebook or Instagram . To learn about AGU activities across UAF follow the #UAFxAGU hashtag on so...

title:
USDA to begin National Agricultural Classification Survey in preparation 
for upcoming 2022 Census of Agriculture
summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) mails the National Agricultural Classification Survey (NACS) this month to more than a million potential U.S. agricultural producers, in preparation for the 2022 Census of Agriculture.
